title: cheilanthes pallens
intro: Cheilanthes pallens, also known as the pale lip fern or pale maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits associated with Cheilanthes pallens include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Cheilanthes pallens can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
